name: Soupa Fakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the lentils for 5 minutes.
2. Empty the water and add 500ml of fresh water.
3. Bring to a boil and allow to simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Add all the other ingredients and allow to cook on low heat until all the ingredients are tender (takes about an hour).
5. Serve when thick.
